info.title: LuminaStudio API
info.description:
API documentation for the **LuminaStudio** application.

**Authentication:** Most endpoints require the `api_key` header. If using Swagger UI, click the **Authorize** button at the top of the page and enter your API key before trying any endpoint.

get.description: Retrieve a list of Booking records with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Field name to sort by. Prefix with '-' for descending order, e.g. -created_date

delete.description: **Warning:** Passing an empty `{}` query will delete ALL records in this entity.

schema.description: Query filter to match records to delete

put.description: Each item must include an 'id' field along with the fields to update.

patch.summary: Update many Booking records by query
patch.description: Update multiple records matching a query filter. Supports MongoDB update operators ($set, $inc, $push, $pull).

get.summary: Get a Booking record by ID

delete.description: Soft-deletes the record. Use the restore endpoint to undo.

get.description: List the authenticated user's agent conversations. Returns the most recent conversations first.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of conversations to return

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Field name to sort by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

post.description: Start a new conversation with an app agent. Available agent names: `booking_assistant`.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent to start a conversation with

metadata.description: Optional metadata to attach to the conversation

get.description: Retrieve a specific conversation by ID, including all messages.

post.description: Send a message to an existing agent conversation and receive the agent's response. The agent processes the message and returns its reply.

content.description: The message text to send to the agent

example.content: Hello, how can you help me?

ApiKeyAuth.name: api_key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Your API key. Obtain it from your user profile or via `User.me()` in the app SDK.

session_date.description: Date and time of the session

access_token.description: Unique token for client portal access

created_by.description: Email of the user who created the record

ip_address.description: IP address at time of signing

created_by.description: Email of the user who created the record
Email of the user who created the record
Email of the user who created the record

session_type.description: Session type this checklist applies to

created_by.description: Email of the user who created the record
Email of the user who created the record

full_name.description: The full name of the user

role.description: The role of the user in the app

created_by.description: Email of the user who created the record

created_by_id.description: ID of the user who created the conversation

messages.description: List of messages in the conversation

metadata.description: Custom metadata attached to the conversation

AgentConversation.description: An agent conversation with its messages

tool_calls.description: List of tool calls made by the agent during this response

usage.description: Token usage metrics for this message

additional_message_params.description: Extra metadata including timing info, tool iteration count, and bottleneck details

metadata.description: Message metadata including created_date and created_by_email

AgentMessage.description: A message in an agent conversation, including the agent's response with tool calls and usage metrics

tags.name: App Agents
tags.description: Interact with app agents via conversations
